level_signals: 4–5 years of experience in Consulting, GTM strategy, sales operations, or revenue operations
Compensation range $123,502 - $154,378 CAD, consistent with mid-senior IC
Lead title with cross-functional orchestration and executive-level storytelling responsibilities

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4–5 years of experience in Consulting, GTM strategy, sales operations, or revenue operations within an enterprise SaaS or technology environment
Experience translating sales strategies, market insights, and field feedback into structured playbooks, enablement assets, or go-to-market toolkits that sellers can actually use
Comfortable working across Product, Marketing, Sales, and Customer Success to gather input, align stakeholders, and move programs forward
Able to synthesize pipeline data, market signals, and field feedback into clear, actionable recommendations
Proven ability to manage multiple concurrent workstreams with different stakeholders and timelines

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in Enterprise SaaS or high-growth technology environments.
Proficiency in Salesforce, Gong, and PowerBI.
Experience working directly with sales teams

scope.surface: AI & Platform GTM team — global field sales plays, strategic deal support, GTM operating cadence
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS, integration and automation platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Sales play adoption and effectiveness by global field
Customer long-term value from pre/post-sales alignment
core_responsibilities: Lead the end-to-end design of strategic sales plays, from initial market segmentation and opportunity identification to the deployment of field-ready sales kits
Create high-impact narratives and deliverables for strategic prospects, translating complex AI platform capabilities into clear business outcomes and strategic roadmaps
Lead the central orchestration across Product, Marketing, Sales, and other GTM teams, ensuring every playbook is validated by stakeholders and optimized for real-world execution
Design and scale programs that integrate Professional Services and Customer Success activities directly into our sales motions to ensure long-term customer value
Support the centralized operating rhythm for the GTM organization, ensuring that the highest-impact assets, training, and insights are delivered to the field with precision and consistency

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed in job posting
Clear role scope and responsibilities described
Encourages applicants who may experience impostor syndrome to still apply
Hybrid role with specific city named (Vancouver, BC)
red_flags: Compensation stated in CAD only; role is Vancouver-specific, limiting geographic flexibility for non-local candidates
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements are not stated
Years of experience range is narrow (4–5 years) which may screen out otherwise qualified candidates
Bonus structure mentioned but not quantified

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirement and compensation range)
seniority.manages_people (not stated; inferred as false from IC-level framing)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and enterprise SaaS context)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred as false from Vancouver hybrid designation)
compensation.base_range_usd (not stated; compensation is in CAD only)
ambiguities: The role title and location say 'Hybrid' but no specific in-office frequency is stated in the body; office time requirement is unclear.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not mentioned anywhere in the JD.

The 'Experience in Enterprise SaaS' nice-to-have overlaps with the must-have which already requires 'enterprise SaaS or technology environment'; the distinction between required and bonus here is slightly redundant.
